title: Blue Sweep & Crit Particle
description: Blue sweep and crit particles for clean PvP.
body:
## ✨ Features

Cyan Criticals: Replaces brown stars with blue colour for better visibility in the Dark/Nether.
Blue Sweeps: Redesigned sword trails with a glowing plasma effect.
Tactical Visibility: Bright blue visuals that pop against any terrain.

## 🛠 Installation
Download the .zip file.

Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs.

Drag and drop the file into the window and move it to the Selected side.

## 👤 Credits & Usage
Created by NotGalib.

## 📜 Permissions
Modpacks & Videos: You are free to include this pack in any modpack or showcase it in videos with credit to **NotGalib**.

Re-uploads: To ensure players get the correct version, please do not re-upload this file to other websites or platforms.
